description: Resolve silent failures in push notifications for users on Android 14 to ensure reliable notification delivery.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user on Android 14 WHEN they receive a push notification THEN the notification should be delivered without failure.

description: Improve notification delivery latency from p95 340ms to under 200ms by optimizing the delivery pipeline.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a notification is sent WHEN measured THEN the p95 delivery latency should be under 200ms.

description: Implement a three-tier notification priority system (urgent, normal, low) to help users distinguish between critical alerts and routine updates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user receives notifications WHEN they are categorized by priority THEN the user can see visual indicators for urgent, normal, and low notifications.

description: Create compliance documentation for notification features to ensure adherence to legal and accessibility standards.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN notification features are implemented WHEN compliance documentation is created THEN it should meet legal and accessibility standards.

description: Allow admins to configure notification preferences at a granular level, enabling defaults per team and individual overrides.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an admin accesses the notification settings WHEN they configure preferences THEN the settings should apply to the specified teams or users.

story_title: Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories
description: Create a settings page where users can opt in/out of specific notification categories (marketing, product updates, social, transactional).
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the notification settings page WHEN they select categories THEN their preferences should be saved and respected.

description: Implement monitoring and alerting for notification delivery performance metrics to ensure compliance with SLAs.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is set up WHEN performance metrics are collected THEN alerts should trigger if thresholds are exceeded.

story_title: Enhance Accessibility Features in Notification Center
description: Improve accessibility in the notification center for users with disabilities, addressing color-only priority indicators.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with disabilities accesses the notification center WHEN they navigate THEN they should be able to identify notifications without relying solely on color.

story_title: Conduct A/B Testing on Notification Content
description: Perform A/B testing on different notification content styles to determine which formats yield higher CTR and lower unsubscribe rates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN different notification content styles are tested WHEN users interact with notifications THEN the CTR and unsubscribe rates should be measured and compared.

story_title: Gather User Feedback on Notification Preferences
description: Collect user feedback on notification preferences to inform future enhancements and ML model training.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a feedback collection mechanism is in place WHEN users provide feedback THEN the data should be stored for analysis.

description: Batch low-priority notifications into a digest delivered at optimal times based on user engagement patterns.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user has low-priority notifications WHEN the ML model determines optimal timing THEN the notifications should be batched and delivered accordingly.
